description_long: This is a charming Parisian-style bistro named 'Le Consulat', featuring a two-story building with a gray mansard roof and multiple chimneys. The facade is painted in a light cream color with a deep red lower section, and the front is adorned with a striped red, green, and orange awning above the entrance and windows. Outdoor seating is provided with several round tables and chairs arranged on a stone-paved terrace, enclosed by short metal posts. The windows on the upper floors have small wrought-iron balconies and colorful awnings, adding to the inviting atmosphere. A prominent sign with the bistro's name and a French flag motif is displayed above the entrance. The building sits on a corner lot, bordered by a sidewalk and surrounded by urban street elements.
description: A Parisian-style bistro called 'Le Consulat' with a striped awning, outdoor seating, and a classic two-story facade featuring colorful window awnings and signage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, striped awning, outdoor tables and chairs, and the 'Le Consulat' signage.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the red lower facade, additional window awnings, and more outdoor seating along the sidewalk.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall with minimal architectural detail and no windows or seating.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible door, window awnings, and outdoor seating extending along the side.
